name: Zenith Minerals Limited
analysis: ZNC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0900. Trade idea: entry A$0.1100, stop A$0.0792, target A$0.2024 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
